title: SICP 2.2.4 full picture-language painters
goal: Add tests/sicp/ch2_picture_painters.esk covering the book's painter model beyond vector/frame data: painters, transforms, beside/below, recursive combinators, and square-limit-style composition.
acceptance: ICC observes sicp_ch2_picture_painters_r and sicp_ch2_picture_painters_aot PASS
ux_payoff: Closes the full picture-language gap rather than only testing frame arithmetic.
